column.name: FPLNR
column.description: Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

column.name: FPLTR
column.description: Item for billing plan/invoice plan/payment cards

column.name: FPROZ
column.description: Percentage of value to be invoiced

column.name: WAERS
column.description: Currency Key of Credit Control Area

column.name: KURFP
column.description: Exchange rate for date in billing plan

column.name: FAKWR
column.description: Value to be billed/calc. on date in billing/invoice plan

column.name: FAKSP
column.description: Billing block for billing plan/invoice plan dates

column.name: FKARV
column.description: Proposed billing type for an order-related billing document

column.name: FKSAF
column.description: Billing status for the billing plan/invoice plan date

column.name: PERIO
column.description: Rule for Origin of Next Billing/Invoice Date

column.name: FPLAE
column.description: Length of a standard period in the billing plan

column.name: TEMAN
column.description: Process as for manually entered date

column.name: FAKCA
column.description: Calendar for Defining Days Relevant to Billing/Invoicing

column.name: AFDAT
column.description: Billing Date for Billing Index and Printout

column.name: NETWR
column.description: Net value of the order item in document currency

column.name: KZWI1
column.description: Subtotal 1 from pricing procedure for condition

column.name: KZWI2
column.description: Subtotal 2 from pricing procedure for condition

column.name: KZWI3
column.description: Subtotal 3 from pricing procedure for condition

column.name: KZWI4
column.description: Subtotal 4 from pricing procedure for condition

column.name: KZWI5
column.description: Subtotal 5 from pricing procedure for condition

column.name: KZWI6
column.description: Subtotal 6 from pricing procedure for condition

column.name: SKFBP
column.description: Amount Eligible for Cash Discount in Document Currency

column.name: TYPZM
column.description: Means of payment for classifying payment card plan lines

column.name: UELNR
column.description: Higher-level payment card plan number for billing

column.name: CCACT
column.description: G/L Account Number for Payment Card Receivables

column.name: KORTE
column.description: Indicator for correction date in billing plan

column.name: _DATAAGING
column.description: Data Filter Value for Data Aging
